case_title: ROSITA CASTANEDA VS. GLEN CIRON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $720.00 FILED BY CASTANEDA, ROSITA AS TO DEFENDANT CIRON, GLEN CIRON, GLORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-26-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CIRON, GLEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-10-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. DEFENDANT GLORIA CIRON DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO GLORIA CIRON BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-10-2011 AT 1:30PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-10-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, ROSITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CIRON, GLEN $220.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $285.00, CLAIM AGAINST GLORIA CIRON IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (NO PROOF OF SERVICE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CIRON, GLEN
